title: 30-Day Dhammapada
description: Work through the Dhammapada one chapter per day — a beautiful introduction to the Dhamma

days.title: Chapter I: The Pairs
days.description: Mind is the forerunner of all actions.

days.title: Chapter II: Heedfulness
days.description: Heedfulness is the path to the deathless.

days.title: Chapter III: The Mind
days.description: The mind is hard to restrain, swift, and wanders where it will.

days.title: Chapter IV: Flowers
days.description: Who shall conquer this earth, this world of Yama?

days.title: Chapter V: The Fool
days.description: Long is the night for the wakeful; long is the league for the weary.

days.title: Chapter VI: The Wise
days.description: Were one to live a hundred years without wisdom and composure...

days.title: Chapter VII: The Arahant
days.description: One whose taints are destroyed, who is not attached to food...

days.title: Chapter VIII: Thousands
days.description: Better than a thousand hollow words is one meaningful word.

days.title: Chapter IX: Evil
days.description: Rush to do good, restrain your mind from evil.

days.title: Chapter X: The Rod
days.description: All tremble at the rod, all fear death.

days.title: Chapter XI: Old Age
days.description: Why is there laughter, why is there joy, when the world is always burning?

days.title: Chapter XII: The Self
days.description: If one holds oneself dear, one should protect oneself well.

days.title: Chapter XIII: The World
days.description: Don't follow a corrupt life, don't be negligent.

days.title: Chapter XIV: The Awakened One
days.description: One whose victory cannot be turned into defeat...

days.title: Chapter XV: Happiness
days.description: Happy indeed are we who live without hate among the hateful.

days.title: Chapter XVI: Affection
days.description: Give yourself to distraction and you miss your purpose.

days.title: Chapter XVII: Anger
days.description: Leave anger, abandon conceit.

days.title: Chapter XVIII: Impurities
days.description: You are like a yellowed leaf; death's minions are waiting for you.

days.title: Chapter XIX: The Just
days.description: Don't be hasty in judging others.

days.title: Chapter XX: The Path
days.description: The Eightfold Path is the best of paths.

days.title: Chapter XXI: Miscellaneous
days.description: If by forsaking a minor pleasure one sees a major pleasure...

days.title: Chapter XXII: Hell
days.description: Speakers of falsehood go to hell.

days.title: Chapter XXIII: The Elephant
days.description: As the elephant in battle endures arrows shot into it...

days.title: Chapter XXIV: Craving
days.description: The craving of a heedless person grows like a maluva creeper.

days.title: Chapter XXV: The Monk
days.description: Restraint of the eye is good; restraint of the ear is good.

days.title: Chapter XXVI: The Brahman
days.description: I call that person a brahman who has cut all fetters.

days.title: Satipaṭṭhāna Sutta
days.description: The direct path — foundations of mindfulness.

days.title: Setting the Wheel of Dhamma
days.description: The first discourse of the Buddha.

days.title: Lovingkindness
days.description: May all beings be happy and secure.

days.title: The Noble Search
days.description: The search for the unborn, the unaging, the undying.

title: Introduction to the MN
description: 10 key suttas from the Majjhima Nikāya — perfect for a first exploration

title: 7-Day Noble Truths
description: Explore the Four Noble Truths through the Buddha's own words — from the first discourse to the path of practice

days.title: Setting the Wheel of Dhamma
days.description: The first discourse — the Four Noble Truths and the Middle Way.

days.title: The Analysis of the Truths
days.description: Venerable Sāriputta explains each truth in detail.

days.title: The Not-Self Characteristic
days.description: The second discourse — the five aggregates are not self.

days.title: The Great Discourse on Foundations of Mindfulness
days.description: The comprehensive guide to the four foundations of mindfulness.

days.title: The Foundations of Mindfulness
days.description: The direct path for the purification of beings.

days.title: Lovingkindness
days.description: The boundless heart — the practice of mettā.

days.title: Analysis of the Path
days.description: The Noble Eightfold Path explained factor by factor.

title: 14-Day Saṁyutta Nikāya Sampler
description: A fortnight journey through the Connected Discourses — thematically grouped suttas on key Buddhist teachings

days.title: Analysis of Dependent Origination
days.description: The twelve links of dependent arising explained.

days.title: Kaccānagotta
days.description: Right view and the middle way between existence and non-existence.

days.title: The Not-Self Characteristic
days.description: The five aggregates — form, feeling, perception, formations, consciousness.

days.title: Anurādha
days.description: The Tathāgata cannot be described after death.

days.title: The Fire Sermon
days.description: Everything is burning — the six sense bases on fire.

days.title: The World Is Empty
days.description: Empty of a self or anything belonging to a self.

days.title: The Dart
days.description: An untrained person feels two pains; the trained, only one.

days.title: Analysis of the Path
days.description: The Noble Eightfold Path factor by factor.

days.title: Fire
days.description: Which awakening factor to develop for which mental state.

days.title: Sedaka
days.description: The acrobat simile — protecting oneself, one protects others.

days.title: Ānanda on Breathing
days.description: Mindfulness of breathing fulfills the four foundations of mindfulness.

days.title: Setting the Wheel of Dhamma
days.description: The first discourse of the Buddha.

days.title: The Siṁsapā Grove
days.description: What the Buddha taught is like a handful of leaves.

days.title: Crossing the Flood
days.description: How the Buddha crossed the flood — neither standing still nor swimming.

title: 5-Day Loving-Kindness
description: A short retreat through the suttas on mettā, karuṇā, and the boundless heart

days.title: Lovingkindness
days.description: The four divine abidings — mettā, karuṇā, muditā, upekkhā.

days.title: Karaṇīya Mettā Sutta
days.description: The Buddha's most beloved teaching on universal lovingkindness.

days.title: Subha — Mettā's Benefits
days.description: Eleven benefits of cultivating lovingkindness.

days.title: The Simile of the Saw
days.description: Even if bandits cut you limb from limb, you should train in goodwill.

days.title: Mettā Mindfulness
days.description: When lovingkindness is developed, great fruit and benefit are to be expected.

title: 21-Day Aṅguttara Nikāya Journey
description: Three weeks exploring the Numbered Discourses — practical teachings organized from ones to elevens

days.title: The Mind — Ones
days.description: The luminous mind, defiled by adventitious defilements.

days.title: Effort & Striving — Twos
days.description: Two things that lead to decline or progress.

days.title: To the Kālāmas — Threes
days.description: Don't go by tradition alone — test the teachings for yourself.

days.title: Sources of Merit — Threes
days.description: Three bases of meritorious activity.

days.title: Lovingkindness — Fours
days.description: The four divine abidings pervading the world.

days.title: In Tandem — Fours
days.description: Meaning and phrasing in the teachings.

days.title: Themes for Reflection — Fives
days.description: I am subject to aging, illness, death, separation, and karma.

days.title: Five Factors — Fives
days.description: Five qualities leading to concentration.

days.title: Mindfulness of Death — Sixes
days.description: Six ways to develop mindfulness of death.

days.title: Penetrative — Sixes
days.description: Six things to be penetrated and known.

days.title: Angry Thoughts — Sevens
days.description: Seven ways to remove annoying thoughts.

days.title: Wealth — Sevens
days.description: The seven treasures of a noble person.

days.title: Mettā — Eights
days.description: Eight benefits of developing mettā.

days.title: Streams of Merit — Eights
days.description: Eight streams of merit and wholesomeness.

days.title: Dīghajāṇu — Eights
days.description: Conditions for happiness in this life and the next.

days.title: Velāma — Nines
days.description: The relative merit of different kinds of giving.

days.title: Girimānanda — Tens
days.description: Ten perceptions that lead to the ending of taints.

days.title: Ignorance — Tens
days.description: How ignorance starts the chain and knowledge ends it.

days.title: Cunda the Silversmith — Tens
days.description: Ten courses of wholesome action.

days.title: Subha — Elevens
days.description: Eleven benefits of cultivating lovingkindness.

days.title: Review: To the Kālāmas
days.description: Come, test the teachings once more with fresh eyes.
